caption: A man with dark hair pulled back and wearing glasses stands before a microphone, singing or speaking. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt under a dark vest featuring ornate blue embroidery and a red beaded necklace. He holds an acoustic guitar across his waist. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, including individuals with blonde and brown hair. The setting is an indoor space with a backdrop of tan-colored horizontal blinds. On the right side of the frame, the text "ORCA" appears in white capital letters. Across the sequence, the man's facial expressions shift slightly as he performs, with his mouth opening and closing, while the surrounding people and the background remain static.
